title: Urechites neriandrus
intro: Urechites neriandrus, also known as the 'Gingerbread Tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The health benefits of Urechites neriandrus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Urechites neriandrus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Urechites neriandrus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Urechites, which is part of the order Gentianales.
